# Bali Air Conditioning Services

> Bali's trusted air conditioning company. Installation, cleaning, servicing and 24/7 repair across all of Bali. Authorised Gree and Daikin partner.

- Phone / WhatsApp: +62 818-0802-9595
- Hours: 24/7 emergency response
- Authorised Gree & Daikin partner

For the dynamic, always-current version, fetch /llms.txt from the live site (served by the Next.js route).
